immediate_actions: Deploy rapid response teams to Jankipuram for case investigation and contact tracing.
Alert all healthcare facilities in Lucknow to prepare for potential influx of flu cases and activate emergency protocols.
Initiate city-wide public awareness campaign on flu symptoms, prevention (hand hygiene, respiratory etiquette), and reporting procedures.
Establish a central command center for real-time data monitoring, resource coordination, and public communication.
Ensure adequate supply of antiviral medications, PPE, and testing kits in designated health facilities across Lucknow.

containment_zones.name: Jankipuram
restrictions: Strict contact tracing and isolation protocols
Temporary closure of non-essential public gatherings
Mandatory thermal screening at key entry points
containment_zones.reason: Origin of flu outbreak, 14 confirmed cases, active community transmission detected.

containment_zones.name: Hazratganj
restrictions: Enhanced public health advisories on flu symptoms and prevention
Promotion of hand hygiene and respiratory etiquette
containment_zones.reason: No projected cases within 72 hours, maintaining high alert and proactive surveillance.

alerts.message: सावधान: Jankipuram में flu के मामले मिले हैं। घर में पानी जमा न होने दें। नजदीकी टेस्टिंग सेंटर जाएं।
